name: Insertion Sort
description: Implement the insertion sort algorithm. Build the sorted array one element at a time by repeatedly taking the next element and inserting it into its correct position among the already-sorted elements. Time: O(n^2), Space: O(1). Efficient for small or nearly sorted arrays.
